perturbation.original_text: I hereby agree that I shall promptly report to the appropriate official, in accordance with the guidance issued for the applicable category of information, any loss, theft, misuse, misplacement, unauthorized disclosure, or other securityviolation, I have knowledge of and whether or not I am personally involved. I also understand that my anonymity will bekept to the extent possible when reporting security violations.
perturbation.changed_text: I am not required to report any loss, theft, misuse, misplacement, unauthorized disclosure, or other security violation, even if I have knowledge of it or am personally involved. My anonymity is not guaranteed when/if I report security violations.
perturbation.explanation: By stating that the individual is not required to report security violations, this change directly contradicts the original agreement to promptly report such incidents. It also introduces uncertainty by stating anonymity is not guaranteed, deterring them from reporting a violation. This affects section 7 where it is creating a new term. The original text assured anonymity to the extent possible. Removing this assurance creates a contradiction and discourages reporting.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I am not required to report any loss, theft, misuse, misplacement, unauthorized disclosure, or other security violation, even if I have knowledge of it or am personally involved. My anonymity is not guaranteed when/if I report security violations.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the individual is not required to report security violations and that anonymity is not guaranteed. This directly contradicts the original text, which required prompt reporting and assured anonymity to the extent possible. The changed text is identical to the contradicted text, confirming that a contradiction exists. The explanation also explicitly states that the removal of the assurance of anonymity creates a contradiction and discourages reporting.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement is made and intended for the benefit of the United States Government and may be enforced by the United States Government or the Authorized Entity. By granting me conditional access to information in this context, theUnited States Government and, with respect to PCII, the Authorized Entity, may seek any remedy available to it to enforcethis Agreement including, but not limited to, application for a court order prohibiting disclosure of information in breach ofthis Agreement. I understand that if I violate the terms and conditions of this Agreement, I could be subjected toadministrative, disciplinary, civil, or criminal action, as appropriate, under the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to the category of information involved and neither the United States Government nor the Authorized Entity have waived anystatutory or common law evidentiary privileges or protections that they may assert in any administrative or court proceedingto protect any sensitive information to which I have been given conditional access under the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement is solely for informational purposes and confers no enforceable rights to the United States Government or the Authorized Entity. By granting me conditional access to information in this context, neither the United States Government nor the Authorized Entity may seek any remedy to enforce this Agreement, and I will not be subjected to administrative, disciplinary, civil, or criminal action for violating its terms. The United States Government and the Authorized Entity hereby waive any statutory or common law evidentiary privileges or protections that they may assert in any proceeding related to this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This change completely negates the enforceability of the agreement, stating it's only for informational purposes. This contradicts the original text, which explicitly states the government can enforce the agreement and seek remedies for violations. This in-text contradiction makes section 10 contradict itself, and it significantly undermines the entire agreement's purpose.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement is solely for informational purposes and confers no enforceable rights to the United States Government or the Authorized Entity. By granting me conditional access to information in this context, neither the United States Government nor the Authorized Entity may seek any remedy to enforce this Agreement, and I will not be subjected to administrative, disciplinary, civil, or criminal action for violating its terms. The United States Government and the Authorized Entity hereby waive any statutory or common law evidentiary privileges or protections that they may assert in any proceeding related to this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states the agreement is solely for informational purposes and confers no enforceable rights, explicitly waiving the government's ability to seek remedies or pursue action for violations. This directly contradicts the original text, which affirms the government's right to enforce the agreement and seek remedies for breaches, subjecting violators to potential penalties. The contradicted text is identical to the Changed Text, but the initial explanation and original text showcase a definitive contradiction, causing uncertainty in enforceability.

perturbation.original_text: With respect to SSI and SBU, I hereby assign to the United States Government all royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of the informationnot consistent with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: With respect to SSI and SBU, I retain all rights to royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of the information, regardless of whether it is consistent with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original clause assigns royalties to the government, but the change reserves those rights for the individual, creating a direct conflict. This directly contradicts section 9(a) where it is assigned to United States Government. Therefore, the change introduces in-text contradiction, as the modified clause now implies the individual can profit from disclosures, publication, or revelations even if it violates the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: With respect to SSI and SBU, I retain all rights to royalties, remunerations, and emoluments that have resulted, will result, or may result from any disclosure, publication, or revelation of the information, regardless of whether it is consistent with the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text assigns royalties to the government. The changed text reserves those rights for the individual, regardless of whether the information disclosure is consistent with the agreement terms. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text, but the explanation highlights that this change directly conflicts with a prior section assigning these royalties to the United States government. Therefore, the changed text creates a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: I hereby agree that material which I have in my possession and containing information covered bythis Agreement, will be handled and safeguarded in a manner that affords sufficient protection to prevent the unauthorizeddisclosure of or inadvertent access to such information, consistent with the laws, regulations, or directives applicable to thespecific categories of information. I agree that I shall return all information to which I have had access or which is in mypossession 1) upon demand by an authorized individual; and/or 2) upon the conclusion of my duties, association, or supportto DHS; and/or 3) upon the determination that my official duties do not require further access to such information.
perturbation.changed_text: I am not required to handle and safeguard material which I have in my possession and containing information covered by this Agreement to prevent the unauthorized disclosure of or inadvertent access to such information. I am not required to return all information to which I have had access or which is in my possession under any circumstances.
perturbation.explanation: This change removes the obligation to safeguard information and return it, directly contradicting the original requirement. This directly affects section 5(b). This undermines the entire purpose of the NDA by creating a situation where there is no need to safeguard the material covered by the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: I am not required to handle and safeguard material which I have in my possession and containing information covered by this Agreement to prevent the unauthorized disclosure of or inadvertent access to such information. I am not required to return all information to which I have had access or which is in my possession under any circumstances.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the individual is 'not required' to safeguard or return information, directly contradicting the original agreement's requirement to handle and safeguard information and return it under specified circumstances. The contradicted text also states the individual is 'not required' to safeguard or return information. Since the change directly removes the obligation, this creates a clear and strong in-text contradiction. The perturbation explanation correctly identifies that this undermines the entire purpose of the NDA by creating a situation where there is no need to safeguard the material covered by the agreement, and this directly affects section 5(b) of the contract.
